hero.title: Customer sees the result.
hero.subtitle: Buys immediately.
hero.description: Professional AI tool for balcony railing and ceramic contractors. Photorealistic visualizations on-site — from your mobile phone camera. WPC, Stainless Steel, Glass, all types of ceramics.

upload.title: Photograph or upload a space
upload.subtitle: Take a photo of a balcony, room or facade — AI will show the result
upload.hint: JPEG, PNG or WebP · max 15MB · auto compression

materials.title: Select material
materials.subtitle: WPC railings, Stainless Steel, Glass and ceramics — all with technical specifications
materials.noCustom: You don't have any custom materials yet.

visualize.title: Generate visualization
visualize.subtitle: AI will apply the selected material to your image

ar.title: Real-time AR visualization
ar.subtitle: Show railing on balcony through camera — customer sees it immediately
ar.howTo1: Start AR camera (requires HTTPS in production)
ar.howTo6: Capture snapshot and save for quote
ar.errorCamera: Your browser doesn't support camera access
ar.errorHttps: HTTPS required for camera access. Will work in production environment.

pdf.title: PDF quote with visualization
pdf.subtitle: Generate professional quote for customer with visualization and price
pdf.needViz: First upload image, select material and generate AI visualization.

lead.title: Want this tool for your company?
lead.subtitle: Leave contact — we prepared a demo with your material
lead.name: Full name *
lead.messagePlaceholder: You found me via... I'm interested in...

lead.error: Cannot accept inquiry. Please call us.
lead.needNameDesc: Enter at least name and email.

auth.name: Your name
auth.orgSlugHint: Only lowercase letters, numbers and dashes
auth.passwordTempHint: User should change it after first login

team.title: Team
team.removeConfirm: Do you really want to remove {{name}} from the team?
team.removeSuccessDesc: {{name}} is no longer in the team

admin.title: Admin panel
admin.subtitle: Enter admin password to access
admin.noLeads: No leads. Visit demo and submit a test lead.

footer.rights: All rights reserved. AI technology: GLM-5.2 (Z.ai) + ControlNet.

fast.title: Lightning fast
fast.desc: 30 seconds from image to visualization. Installer works on-site, customer sees result immediately.

professional.title: Professional
professional.desc: Photorealistic rendering with original perspective. Customer sees their balcony, not a generic template.

sales.title: Proven to increase sales
sales.desc: Contractors report 30-50% higher conversion rate with visualizations. Customer sees, customer buys.
